v1.title: Important notice before you continue
v1.body: The final agreement, payment, and any contract take place outside EventFlow. The platform does not process payments or charge penalties. By continuing, you confirm that you understand and accept these conditions.
v1.checkbox: I understand and accept these conditions.

cancel.title: Cancel booking intent
cancel.description: The booking intent will be marked as cancelled. If it was confirmed, we revert the commitment in the budget and notify the counterpart. This action cannot be undone.
cancel.success: Cancellation applied. We notified the counterpart.

errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: There was a problem with your request. Please try again.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to cancel.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Your role cannot cancel this booking.
errors.BOOKING_INTENT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this booking or it is no longer available.
errors.BOOKING_INTENT_NOT_CANCELLABLE: This booking cannot be cancelled in its current state.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
